'''Batorine''' was the forested [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Blood Carver]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. It joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in [[110 BBY]].

==History==
The homeworld of the [[Blood Carver]] race, the planet Batorine was discovered by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] after the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformations]]. Embroiled in a terrible, centuries-long war, the planet's natives were nearly driven to [[extinction]] by a species known as the [[Lontar]]s. Intervening in the conflict, the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] demanded a cessation of violence on the world and Batorine formally joined the ancient institution in [[110 BBY]]. A world of artisans and [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]], Batorine's population remained less then one million sentients long after the conflict ended; many Blood Carvers relocated to secret enclaves on the Republic capital world, [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="RP" />

{{Planet-stub}}
